intro: Government and technology sectors faced significant incident response demands in April 2026, with 11 articles covering events from April 13 to 30. The period included five high-severity and two critical incidents, alongside one medium-severity case. The critical vulnerability CVE-2025-59718, carrying a CVSS score of 9.8, was a key concern. Affected sectors spanned government, technology, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and energy, while impacted regions included Europe, Global, North America, the United States, and Venezuela.
